name: Global Innovative Platforms Inc.
business: Global Innovative Platforms is focused on advancing animal health through breath analysis and air quality technology. Our initial priority is to develop a breath test to detect early-stage and mature heartworm infections in dogs. We develop non-invasive diagnostic tools for detecting diseases in animals and agriculture.

exposures.sentence: We are developing the Breath Test focused on detecting heartworm in dogs with the added benefits of earlier detection, non-invasive sampling process, and the ability to monitor response to treatment for infected dogs.
Our proprietary technologies, VOCAM Plus and the FROG, utilize advanced gas chromatography and A.I. software to provide rapid and accurate breath and air analysis.

We utilize a proprietary artificial intelligence software to analyze our data and are confident that it will be reliable for our purpose. The software is called Ellvin and is controlled by Defiant Technologies.

catalysts.event: Completion of the Heartworm Breath Test components, verification and validation studies acceptable to begin commercialization
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate the completion (note that revisions will potentially be made based on data we obtain from use over time) of the components, the Heartworm Breath Test, and the verification and validation studies in 2026 that will be acceptable to begin commercialization.

catalysts.event: Start of algorithm development studies for Heartworm Breath Test
catalysts.sentence: We began algorithm development studies for our Heartworm Breath Test in March 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 10 million dogs in the U.S. tested for heartworm annually at $30-$50 per test
tamClaims.sentence: Based on the data from the Companion Animal Parasite Council and Virginia Tech University, there are approximately 10 million dogs in the U.S. tested for heartworm annually at a cost of $30 to $50 per test, with most of these dogs being pets.
